scripts.codegen: env-cmd --no-override -x -r ../../env-dev.json -e postgres node ../../packages/vexnor/cli.mjs codegen --plugin vexnor-postgres --schema vexnor_dev  --camelCaseColumns --host \$POSTGRES_HOST --port \$POSTGRES_PORT --database \$POSTGRES_DATABASE --user \$POSTGRES_USER --password \$POSTGRES_PASSWORD --outDir './src/codegen' | pino-pretty
